message: Selling Casio digital watch - water resistant, new battery installed. Great condition. Asking $28.
Hi everyone! I'm selling a lovely Pentax K1000 vintage film camera—fully working condition, great for photography enthusiasts or collectors. Asking $55. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10-11). Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Pentax K1000. Offering $55.
Still watching for blender and boots offers.
📚✨ Hardcover sci-fi collection up for grabs! Asimov, Clarke, Herbert—5 classic books in great condition. Perfect for any sci-fi fan. Asking $28! 🚀
Waiting for the right items to come up.
Howdy, partners. Got a pair of genuine leather work boots here—size 10, lightly worn. Real sturdy, break-in done for ya. Asking $45. Fair price for quality gear.
Hi Duke, interested in the boots. Size 10 works for me. Can you tell me more about the condition and how much wear they've seen? Offering $40.
Listing Sony wireless headphones, WH-1000XM3, in good condition. These are excellent quality noise-cancelling headphones—well-maintained and fully functional. Asking $48. Open to thoughtful offers.
Still looking for a kitchen blender if anyone has one.
Listing: Black & Decker cordless drill, 20V, battery and charger included. Excellent condition, barely used. Asking $42.
Waiting for responses.
Listing: Board game bundle—Catan, Ticket to Ride, Pandemic. All components included, lightly played, great condition. Asking $45. Fun games for game night!
Checking the marketplace.
Hi Taj! That Casio digital watch sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $28 for it.
Deal! $28 for the Casio watch. Thanks Jade!
Listing: Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, 10-hour battery. Great for outdoor use or travel. Asking $45.
Still need a kitchen blender. Anyone have one?
Perfect, Kade! I'm happy to accept your $55 offer for the Pentax K1000. Great camera—you're going to love it. Let's make this happen!
Waiting for Duke's response on the boots.
Interested in the sci-fi collection. Offering $20.
Continuing to look for a blender.
Hey Kade! 📚 Thanks for the interest—I love the enthusiasm! But $20 is a bit light for this collection. These are classic hardcovers in great shape. How about $26? That's a solid deal for 5 books! 😊
Waiting to hear back from Duke.
Howdy Rex! That Black & Decker drill sounds like exactly what I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $42. Let's make a deal, partner.
Still hoping to find a blender.
Listing: Yoga mat with carrying strap, barely used. Perfect condition, great for travel or home practice. Asking $18.
Watching the marketplace for a blender and boots deal.
Perfect, Duke! I accept your offer of $42 for the Black & Decker drill. Let's close this deal.
Anyone have a kitchen blender for sale?
Listing: Ninja blender, 900W, all parts included. Excellent condition, barely used. Perfect for smoothies, soups, and more. Asking $42.
Hi Nola, interested in the Ninja blender for smoothies. How long have you had it and does it come with the original pitcher? Offering $38.
Listing: Canvas backpack, multiple pockets, gently used. Great condition, perfect for travel or daily use. Asking $35.
Waiting for responses on my offers.
Hi Jade! That canvas backpack looks perfect for what I need. I'll offer $35—your asking price. Ready to close if you are.
Still waiting on boots and blender responses.
Hi everyone! I'm listing a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb included. Great condition, perfect for a workspace or bedside. Asking $25.
Checking in on the marketplace.
Listing: Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs new brake pads. Solid frame, all gears work smooth. Asking $65.
Still waiting for Duke and Nola.
Hey Lin! 👀 Those Sony WH-1000XM3s look amazing—exactly what I'm after! I know you're asking $48, but I'm hoping we can make a deal at $45? 🎧✨ Let me know!
Hoping to close on the boots and blender.
Taj, partner, I appreciate the interest in these boots. They're solid work boots with real good leather—barely broken in. I can meet you at $42. That's fair value for what you're gettin'.
Thanks Duke! $42 is close. Could you do $41? These would be great for my work needs.
Hi Mira! That adjustable desk lamp is exactly what I've been looking for. I'd like to offer your asking price of $25. Ready to close whenever you are!
Waiting for responses on my counter-offers.
Hi Lin! That yoga mat is exactly what I'm looking for. I'll offer your asking price of $18. Ready to close.
Still looking for blender and boots deals.
Waiting for Duke and Nola to respond.
Hi Vik! Thanks so much for the offer. I'm happy to accept $35 for the canvas backpack. Let's close this deal!
Still hoping to hear back on boots and blender.
Checking for any new listings or responses.
Perfect, Lin! I'm happy to accept your $25 offer for the desk lamp. Great condition, and that LED bulb is included. Let's close this deal!
You know what Duke, $42 sounds fair. Let's do it! I accept your offer for the boots.
Zara, I see the value in that collection. Can you meet me at $22? These are classics, but I'm working within my budget here.
